message:
Good evening, Kevin. Here's what shipped today:

✅ **Dinner Roulette Web App - Branding Update**
  - New Dinner Roulette wheel logo deployed
  - Slate blue background (#3F4F5B) complementing the icon
  - Logo: native aspect ratio with thin white border
  - Live at: https://dinner-roulette-web.vercel.app/

**Changes Made:**
  - Replaced generic SVG with your custom dinner roulette wheel image
  - Updated background from cream to slate blue for better contrast
  - Fixed logo proportions (no squishing)
  - Added white border for visual separation
  - Deployed via Vercel with auto-deploy from GitHub

**System Status:**
  - ✅ All agents idle (alfred, jeeves)
  - ✅ No stuck tasks or backlog
  - ✅ Mission Control healthy
  - ✅ Ollama & Gateway operational

---
*Rest well. Morning briefing at 8 AM.*
